Quality stable: KLAC ROE 103%/OM 41%/rev g+24%, TSM ROE 35%/OM 54%/EPS g+46%, energy OM~12%/ROE~11%, LMT ROE 81%; FY26-28 ests upward across holdings
No thesis damage or material news/est cuts last 7d; non-rebalance (6d since checkpoint) favors hold vs turnover on marginal edge

thesis: Current holdings show strong multi-factor scores with KLAC/SLV/XOM/TSM leading momentum (34-56% composite) while maintaining quality (high ROE/OM, stable-to-up growth per latest ratios)
Tool data confirms no evidence of thesis damage; ratios/estimates stable-to-up with continued FY26-28 rev/EPS growth across semis/energy/defense/metals
Mixed regime still rewards selective quality+momentum in semis/energy/metals over broad indices per pack-derived relative strength
risks: IT concentration (44%) vulnerable to capex slowdown or semi cycle shift
Commodity volatility in GLD/SLV amid mixed macro and high vol (36-57%) with notable drawdowns
Execution risk from weekly cadence on non-rebalance day with marginal incremental edge
falsifiable_checks: Any core holding 30d mom falls below 15% or underperforms SPY by >5%
Material negative guidance, est cut >5%, or ROE/OM deterioration in next reports
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base: mixed regime favors existing resilient leaders with stable fundamentals; bull: continued semi/energy/metals strength; bear: broad equity or commodity shock; edge too marginal to justify turnover today.
